rules: Turn Sequence: 1. Execute Action -> 2. Resolve Melee Damage/Mana absorption -> 3. Trigger Rupture (if mana >0 -> <=0) -> 4. Process Corrosion Ticks -> 5. Decay Status Durations -> 6. Check Victory/Transition.
Hero Damage Resolution: damage = enemy.atk; mana_absorbed = min(hero.mana, damage); hero.mana -= mana_absorbed; hero.hp -= (damage - mana_absorbed).
Rupture Trigger: If hero.mana transitions from > 0 to <= 0 during a melee attack, all living enemies with Manhattan distance 1 from hero take damage.
Corrosion Tick: Every enemy with Corrosion duration > 0 takes max(0, 1 * (target.unit_type == 'Glass' ? 2 : 1)) damage.
Resonant Penalty: If a Resonant enemy is hit by Rupture, hero.hp -= 1.
Battle Transition: If all enemies in current_battle_idx are dead, current_battle_idx++, hero.pos = [0,0], load next battle enemies/terrain. If no more battles, status = VICTORY.
